out_of_owl2ql.A1: ~60s beacon cadence — needs window/aggregation; OWL2QL is first-order-rewritable (no aggregation)
out_of_owl2ql.A3: cross-source kill-chain ordering — needs sort/aggregation over joins
out_of_owl2ql.A5: recursive identity closure — OWL2QL is non-recursive (no transitive closure)
out_of_owl2ql.A7: dwell-time delta — needs aggregation across events

SELECT DISTINCT f_network.event_uid
FROM f_network
WHERE (f_network.bytes_out < 100 AND f_network.bytes_in < 100)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM f_network AS fn2
    WHERE fn2.src_ip = f_network.src_ip
    AND fn2.dst_ip = f_network.dst_ip
    AND ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (fn2.time - f_network.tim
SELECT cmd_line FROM f_process WHERE device_hostname = 'WS1' AND cmd_line LIKE '%-EncodedCommand%'
SELECT event_uid FROM f_api WHERE api_operation = 'AttachUserPolicy' AND mfa_present = FALSE
SELECT query_hostname FROM f_dns WHERE src_hostname = 'WS1' GROUP BY query_hostname HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ORDER BY time LIMIT 1
